description: Deletes a Time Off record for a specified Person within a given company. The ID of the deleted record is returned upon successful deletion.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: time_off_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the Time Off record.

schema.description: Response body for a successful Time Off record deletion.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted Time Off record.
